title: HAR
description: A 2.5D top-down local co-op action game set on the slopes of Ergenekon mountain. Two players work together to transport a sacred flame through treacherous terrain — gathering coal and wood, operating bellows, and keeping the fire alive against rain, wind, and the mountain's harsh conditions. Made for Turkic Game Jam 2026.

title: Masquerade Survivors
description: A fast-paced Bullet Heaven with a unique Stance Dancing mechanic. Swap between three masks — Bull, Scout, and Mystic — each with distinct weapons and passives. Time your 2-second cooldown between switches as you level up and unlock global upgrades that apply across all forms simultaneously.

title: The Forking Path
description: A grid-based puzzle adventure where every choice forks the path. Navigate procedurally generated caves filled with traps, enemies, and shifting environments. Manipulate time, fork reality, and master element interactions — stones, vines, water, and lava all chain-react in surprising ways. Endless replayability.

title: TetraBros
description: A chaotic 2-player wizard duel in a storm of falling Tetris blocks. Fireballs stun but only knockback kills — push your opponent into hazards, dodge the sweeping laser, and survive the abyss. First to 5 kills claims victory! Made for Ankara Game Jam.

title: Magical Veins
description: Harness the power of an ancient magical tower. Mine mystical runes to fuel castle effects — Heal, Damage, Energy — each shifting across four intensity levels. Low instability weakens you, maximum power devastates enemies. The forge drains randomly each turn; manage risk carefully.

title: BlupBLOB
description: A chaotic 1–4 player arena brawler set in a bioluminescent microscopic world. Compete as single-celled organisms wielding organelle abilities — Spear, Bomb, Dash, and Engulf. Dynamic upgrades, bot AI, and multiple maps. Made for OstimTech Jam 2026.

title: Hack N' Dough
description: A 2D side-scrolling beat 'em up with a unique claymation stop-motion visual style. Fight through waves of opponents with combo moves like Triple Punch, Leg Swipe, Uppercut Launch, and Meteor Dive. Supports local co-op on keyboard and gamepad. Made for Tedu Jam 2026.

title: Injected
description: A fast-paced top-down shooter set inside the human body. Control a white blood cell defending the lymph node against viruses, bacteria, and infected cells. Features a unique split-and-merge mechanic — divide into two independently controlled units for advanced dodging and flanking. Made for OstimTech Jam 2026.

title: Dud OS
description: Remote-connect to a malfunctioning power suit and debug its bizarre operating system. Fix code errors, drag objects onto buttons, and help the evrenaut survive hazards to defeat the alien boss. An isometric pixel-art puzzle game with a quirky sense of humor.

title: Sudo Mice
description: A local multiplayer strategy game where two mice duel by typing terminal commands. Summon units, attack the opponent's castle, and use sudo for root privileges — unlocking giant units, healing, and power-ups. Rock-paper-scissors unit superiority with sudo units getting 4x health and 2x damage. Made for ATOM Game Jam #2.

title: Is There A Game?
description: A solo prototype platformer puzzle game made in 3 days for ATOM Game Jam. Navigate through levels using teleportation, reflective bullets, levers, pressure plates, and floating boxes. All code, art, SFX, and music created by one person — some sound effects made with just a mouth.

title: Digit Crush
description: A relaxing number puzzle game where you combine digits that differ by at most 1. Form lines of three or more numbers to score points — longer lines earn more. Higher digits appear as you progress. Features a creative drawing mode on saved lines.

title: Fok N' Roll
description: A rhythm game where seals rock out on stage — give them the concert they deserve.

title: Rock Unroll
description: Rock rolling simulator for Rakun Jam. Guide a boulder through physics-based puzzle levels.
